t_ch: 所谓天女，只是谎言！
t_en: The maiden talk is just a lie!

t_ch: 是谁在叫喊？
t_en: Who is shouting?

t_ch: 天外之界？这是可以说的吗？
t_en: A world beyond the sky? Can you even speak of that?

t_ch: 他吼那么大声干嘛啦？
t_en: What is he yelling for?

t_ch: 要我说，准是艾格勒的女儿。
t_en: I'd say it's Aquila's daughter.

t_ch: 粉霞天女？很流行吗？
t_en: Rosy Celestial Maiden? Is she famous?

t_ch: 粉霞天女与阿格莱雅大人孰美？
t_en: Rosy Celestial Maiden and Lady Aglaea, who is more beautiful?

t_ch: 可惜，没来得及进辩论场。
t_en: Unfortunately, it didn't make it into the Forum.

t_ch: 粉霞天女，是哪个城邦的？
t_en: Which city is Rosy Celestial Maiden from?

t_ch: 达米亚诺斯的话还没说完就被守卫拽走了。
t_en: Damionis was dragged away by the guards before he could finish his sentence.

t_ch: 缇宝开启「百界门」，将你们送至命运重渊。
t_en: Tribbie opened the Century Gate and sent all of you to the Abyss of Fate.

t_ch: 先看看能不能直接前进吧。
t_en: Let's see if we can move straight ahead first.

t_ch: 这个砝码似乎被泰坦施加了祝福，无法使用变手抓取。
t_en: This weight seems to be blessed by the Titan and cannot be grabbed using a magic hand.

t_ch: 你花费了些功夫，将砝码放回了原位。
t_en: It takes you some effort to put the weights back in place.

t_ch: 此处正是列车车厢坠毁之地，你至今心有余悸。如今想来，应当是尼卡多利的长矛击落了车厢。不知道把车厢打捞起来修理修理，还能不能让它重新驰往天际。
t_en: This is the site where the coach crashed, and even now, the memory of the incident fills you with unease. Thinking back, it was likely Nikador's spear that brought the car down. You can't help but wonder — if the wreckage was salvaged and repaired, could the car once again take to the skies?

t_ch: 留在这段记忆的时间已经所剩无几…要把道别的机会留给卡芙卡吗？
t_en: There is very little time left to stay in this memory... Do you want to leave the chance of bidding goodbye to Kafka?

t_ch: 留在这段记忆的时间已经所剩无几…要把道别的机会留给流萤吗？
t_en: There is very little time left to stay in this memory... Do you want to leave the chance of bidding goodbye to Firefly?

t_ch: 就和卡芙卡道别吧。
t_en: Bid Kafka goodbye.

t_ch: 就和流萤道别吧。
t_en: Bid Firefly goodbye.

t_ch: 再考虑考虑。
t_en: Need time to think about it.

t_ch: 接受欧洛尼斯的邀请
t_en: Accept Oronyx's invitation

t_ch: 接受{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的邀请，进入你的「过去」
t_en: Accept {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s invitation and enter your "past"

t_ch: 任务完成，缇宝应你们的呼唤而来，将你们带回了奥赫玛。
t_en: As the mission has been completed, Tribbie arrives per your summons and brings you back to Okhema.

t_ch: 缇宝再次开启「百界门」，与白厄、丹恒一同驰援悬锋城。
t_en: Tribbie opens the Century Gate once more, rushing to the rescue of Castrum Kremnos with Phainon and Dan Heng.

t_ch: 时间紧迫，先看看能不能直接前进吧。
t_en: Time is running out. Check if you can directly move straight ahead.

t_ch: 凯妮斯冷笑着离开了。
t_en: Caenis sneers and departs.

t_ch: 你们三人赶赴悬锋城，来到斗技场的中央
t_en: The three of you rush into Castrum Kremnos and arrive at the arena

t_ch: 不知谁掉落的卷轴
t_en: A Scroll Dropped by an Unknown Person

t_ch: 躺椅
t_en: Lounger

t_ch: 浴池
t_en: Bath

t_ch: 阳台
t_en: Balcony

t_ch: 先借用扎格列斯之手尝试通过{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的考验吧。
t_en: Firstly, try to pass {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s trial with the Hand of Zagreus.

t_ch: 砝码似乎被泰坦施加了祝福，无法使用扎格列斯之手抓取。
t_en: It seems that the weights have been blessed by the Titans and cannot be seized by the Hand of Zagreus.

t_ch: 现在不需要替换配重物了，想想别的办法吧。
t_en: There's no need to replace the weights now. Try thinking of a different approach.

t_ch: 此地名为云石天宫，是奥赫玛的公共浴场。换作平时，气氛会更熙攘些。
t_en: We're here at Marmoreal Palace, Okhema's public baths. Normally, this place would be much livelier.

t_ch: 抱歉，前方暂时不便通行。
t_en: I'm sorry, this route is not open yet.

t_ch: 贵客，是这边，请随我来。
t_en: It's this way. Come with me.

t_ch: 回头看看吧，从这里望去，可以看见整座奥赫玛。
t_en: Turn around and look. We can see the entire city of Okhema from here.

t_ch: 市民们都回来了，还真迅速。
t_en: That's fast. The citizens are already back in the city.

t_ch: 他们聚在那儿在做什么？
t_en: Why are they gathered there?

t_ch: 用力…再用点力！
t_en: Come on... Put in more strength!

t_ch: 怎么偏偏倒在家门口啊……
t_en: Why did it have to fall right in front of our home...

t_ch: 谁去找个祭司来？
t_en: Maybe someone should go fetch a priest?

t_ch: 奇迹…活生生的奇迹！
t_en: A miracle... A miracle fresh from the oven!

t_ch: 传出去，快把这故事讲给那吟游诗人听：
t_en: Go, bring word to the bard.

t_ch: 边疆的英雄来到奥赫玛，在此建立起丰功伟业……
t_en: Frontier heroes grace Okhema, feats abound right here...

t_ch: 下一步去哪儿？
t_en: Where should we go next?

t_ch: 刚才被打断了，继续探索城镇吧。
t_en: Right, we were going to explore the city before we got distracted.

t_ch: 如果我有一双翅膀……
t_en: If only I had a pair of wings...

t_ch: 我一定要征服天空！
t_en: I'd conquer the skies for sure!

t_ch: 看，白厄在那边。
t_en: Look, Phainon is over there.

t_ch: 那位是…先前遇见的女士。
t_en: Hey, that's... the lady we encountered previously.

t_ch: 它们的饲料很干净，是干燥的红土。边上就有一些。
t_en: Their feed is dry redsoil and it's very clean. There is some over there.

t_ch: 一下这么多人……
t_en: There are so many people all of a sudden...

t_ch: 偏偏这种时候，四周打听下？
t_en: At a time like this... Why not ask around?

t_ch: <size=28>别追我，不许过来！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Stop chasing after me! Don't come any closer!</size>

t_ch: 达米亚诺斯，果然是他！我们快追上去。
t_en: It's really Damionis! Let's give chase.

t_ch: 他往生命花园跑了，快追！
t_en: He's running toward the Garden of Life. Give chase!

t_ch: <size=28>我是达米亚诺斯！我会向所有人证明！</size>
t_en: <size=28>I'm Damionis! And I will prove it to everyone!</size>

t_ch: 大吵大叫的…
t_en: What's all this fuss...

t_ch: 让不让人做生意了？
t_en: Can't a guy run his business in peace?

t_ch: 那家伙…
t_en: That guy...

t_ch: 闯进黄金裔浴场了？
t_en: Barged into the Chrysos Heirs' baths?

t_ch: 他刚才在喊…粉霞天女？
t_en: He was just shouting about... the Rosy Celestial Maiden?

t_ch: 要不回家保平安吧…
t_en: Maybe we should go home to stay safe...

t_ch: 天女！天女！
t_en: Celestial maiden! Celestial maiden!

t_ch: 有一天，我也要当天女！
t_en: I want to become a celestial maiden one day!

t_ch: 不许瞎说！
t_en: Stop that nonsense!

t_ch: 你要脚踏实地！
t_en: Be realistic!

t_ch: 这下难办了，在被阿格莱雅知道前…尽力弥补吧。
t_en: This is going to be difficult. Let's try to salvage the situation before Aglaea finds out...

t_ch: 真言狮口…应该就在附近。
t_en: Verax Leo... should be nearby.

t_ch: 粉霞天女！快来买啊！
t_en: Rosy Celestial Maiden merch! Come get them right here!

t_ch: 如果还是被问起，我们就如实承认。
t_en: If they ask us about it, we should just come clean with everything.

t_ch: 毕竟我们也救下了一位公民的性命。
t_en: After all, we still saved a citizen's life.

t_ch: 两位，这边这边！等你们好久啦。
t_en: Hey, over here! We've been waiting for quite some time.

t_ch: 对了，从这儿能远眺重渊。如果要拍照，是个不错的地点。
t_en: Oh right, you can see the Abyss from here. It's quite a nice place for a photo.

t_ch: 若要留在奥赫玛，两位自然需要一处落脚之地。
t_en: If you are to stay in Okhema, you'll need a place to rest.

t_ch: 这份礼物可以解决你们的困扰。
t_en: This gift will address your troubles.

t_ch: 差不多了么？最后，还有一件特别的赠礼。
t_en: Finished exploring? I still have one last special gift for you.

t_ch: 是什么？告诉我们吧。
t_en: What is it? Tell us.

t_ch: 这边，我会亲自为二位说明。
t_en: Come this way, I'll explain it to you.

t_ch: 稍等，还想再看看。
t_en: Not yet, I want to explore the place a little more.

t_ch: 请随意，我会静候二位。
t_en: As you wish. I will wait for you here.

t_ch: …这是什么意思？
t_en: ...What is the meaning of this?

t_ch: 怎么又来？！
t_en: Why is this happening again?

t_ch: 果然被发现了…
t_en: We've been made...

t_ch: 意料之中的展开。
t_en: As expected.

t_ch: 这不是玩笑，而是一场审讯。
t_en: This is no laughing matter. It's an interrogation.

t_ch: 两位在城中游荡时，有人始终在留意你们的行动。很遗憾…你们背弃了诺言。
t_en: While the both of you were roaming the city, someone was paying attention to your every move. Unfortunately... you have broken your promises.

t_ch: 你果然已经知道了…但我们是为了救人。
t_en: So, you are indeed aware of our transgression... However, we only did so to save a life.

t_ch: 圣城的命运如细丝般脆弱。为剪除祸端，我必须审慎。
t_en: The holy city's fate is as fragile as thread. I must exercise prudence in order to eliminate sources of potential disaster.

t_ch: 我会再给两位一次机会，重新缝补信任的裂帛。金线会替我做出裁决，坦诚则生…欺瞒则亡。
t_en: I will grant the both of you another chance to mend our broken trust. The golden thread shall judge on my behalf. If you're truthful, you will live, else... you will perish.

t_ch: 又见面了，两位客人。
t_en: We meet again, distinguished guests.

t_ch: 遐蝶会是你们的行刑人。
t_en: Castorice will be your executioner.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅女士，我们因疏漏大意打破了约定，这点无法否认。但你从未说明泄露「天外之界」可能导致的恶果。
t_en: Lady Aglaea, it is undeniable that we broke our agreement out of carelessness. However, you never explained to us how revealing that a world beyond the sky exists would lead to dire consequences.

t_ch: 我想知道，我们究竟犯下了多大的罪行？
t_en: What I want to know is, exactly how grave a crime have we committed?

t_ch: 合理的诉求。未能及时向你们道出全部，是我的过失。
t_en: A reasonable request. It is indeed my oversight for failing to tell you everything in time.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯从不缺少向往天外的人。曾有一邦僭主穷尽举国之力修建「天舟」，意欲突破苍穹、企及星空……
t_en: There have always been people in Amphoreus who looked beyond the skies. Indeed, there used to be a tyrant nation that spared no expense in constructing "skyships," with the desire to break through the blue sky and reach the stars...

t_ch: 但在天舟启航的瞬间，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的神罚降临了。一整座城邦，连同所有的臣民，于刹那间灰飞烟灭。
t_en: However, {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} divine punishment fell the instant the fleet of skyships took flight. An entire city-state, along with all of its subjects, was reduced to ash in that moment.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯并非不愿行向群星，只是妄图触犯天穹者，无不触怒神明，令生灵的大地燃烧，凡人的国度殒灭，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}只是其中一例。
t_en: It's not that Amphoreus is unwilling to head toward the stars. Yet, anyone who even thinks about breaching the firmament would undoubtedly infuriate the gods, causing this land of the living to burn and an entire nation of mortals to perish. The {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#} is only one example of this.

t_ch: 那是绝不可以踏足的禁地。
t_en: This is forbidden territory which can never be ventured into.

t_ch: 难道闭目塞听就是对的？
t_en: So you're saying that it's better to pretend it doesn't exist instead?

t_ch: 人们总会向往天空，你阻止不了。
t_en: Humanity has always longed for the sky... and this is something that you cannot prevent.

t_ch: 我们对翁法罗斯没有恶意…
t_en: We mean no harm toward Amphoreus...

t_ch: 神罚没有公正可言，而我身为奥赫玛的守护者，同样身不由己。
t_en: Divine punishment has never been fair. As Okhema's guardian, I must do the same.

t_ch: 这就是受泰坦支配的世界，必须由黄金裔颠覆的世界。
t_en: This is a world dominated by Titans. And that order can only be toppled by the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 对此，我能做的事也只有一件，那就是确保二位…绝无二心。
t_en: Therefore, the only thing that I can do right now is to ensure that the both of you remain... devoted.

t_ch: 三步，遐蝶。
t_en: Three steps, Castorice.

t_ch: …是，阿格莱雅女士。
t_en: ...Yes, Lady Aglaea.

t_ch: 我将以「四问」考验你们。昧心的回答会令金线震颤，真诚的回应则平静无波。
t_en: I shall ask you four questions. Dishonest answers will cause the golden thread to vibrate, while truthful responses will not affect the thread.

t_ch: 而金线颤动的次数…便是行刑人将要前进的步数。
t_en: The number of times that the thread trembles... is the number of steps forward that the executioner will take.

t_ch: 四问过后，若她没有走到你们背后，便算两位通过了考验。反之，你们的旅途只能止步于此了。
t_en: If she isn't standing right behind you after all four questions have been asked and answered, the both of you will have passed this test. If she is... your journey will end here.

t_ch: 只是在温柔的花乡中睡去，没有一丝痛苦…我保证。
t_en: You'll fall asleep amid the warm embrace of flowers and feel no pain... That I can guarantee.

t_ch: 别保证这种事啊！
t_en: There's no need for such guarantees!

t_ch: 是不是有两次撒谎机会？
t_en: Does this mean that we can lie up to two times?

t_ch: 若你将生命视作儿戏，悉听尊便。
t_en: If you treat your lives as mere trifles, then you may do as you wish.

t_ch: 无论她怎么说，{NICKNAME}，我们只要无愧于心就好。
t_en: Regardless of what she says, {NICKNAME}, we'll be fine as long as our consciences are clear.

t_ch: 那便开始吧…第一问。
t_en: Well then, let us begin. Question One.

t_ch: 异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>你们为何来到翁法罗斯？</color>
t_en: Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>why have you come to Amphoreus?</color>

t_ch: 为了解决这个世界的困扰。
t_en: To solve the problems plaguing this world.

t_ch: 金色的丝线微微地颤动。
t_en: The golden thread trembles slightly.

t_ch: 半分诚实，半分掩饰。但规则没有妥协的余地。记作一步。
t_en: A half-truth that still conceals some facts. Yet, the rules leave no room for compromise. A step will be recorded.

t_ch: 为了我们的旅程能够继续。
t_en: To allow our journey to continue.

t_ch: 金色的丝线平静如初。
t_en: The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.

t_ch: 真诚的回答。此步不记。
t_en: A truthful response. A step will not be recorded.

t_ch: 为了把这里搅个天翻地覆！
t_en: To turn this place upside down!

t_ch: 金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
t_en: The golden thread trembles violently.

t_ch: 玩笑并不能掩藏你的真心。机会稍纵即逝，你已经浪费了一次。
t_en: Jokes cannot conceal your true intentions. Opportunities are fleeting and you've just wasted one.

t_ch: 第二问。
t_en: Question Two.

t_ch: 异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>你们因何对奥赫玛伸出援手？</color>
t_en: Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>why did you lend your aid to Okhema?</color>

t_ch: 出于勇气，无私，侠义之心！
t_en: Because of our courageous spirit and selfless hearts!

t_ch: 金色的丝线微微地颤动。
t_en: The golden thread trembles slightly.

t_ch: 勇气有余，但失之纯粹…记作一步。
t_en: A response that is certainly full of spirit, but lacking in sincerity... A step will be recorded.

t_ch: 我后悔了，压根就不该出手！
t_en: I regret what we did. We shouldn't have aided Okhema at all!

t_ch: 金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
t_en: The golden thread trembles violently.

t_ch: 愤怒吞没了你。记作一步。
t_en: You've let your anger consume you. A step will be recorded.

t_ch: 为了我们的旅程能够继续。
t_en: To allow our journey to continue.

t_ch: 金色的丝线平静如初。
t_en: The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.

t_ch: 没有波动，此步不记。
t_en: No fluctuations detected. A step will not be recorded.

t_ch: 第三问。
t_en: Question Three.

t_ch: 异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>倘若形势剧变，你是否可能将刀尖对准奥赫玛，还有它的公民？</color>
t_en: Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>if the current situation changed dramatically, could you eventually point your blades at Okhema and its citizens?</color>

t_ch: 我…无法保证。
t_en: I... can't make any guarantees.

t_ch: 金色的丝线平静如初。
t_en: The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.

t_ch: 不加修饰的回答，你没有顾忌它可能招致的对立或猜疑。此步不记。
t_en: A response that lacks embellishment. You have no misgivings about the friction or suspicion that your answer might cause. A step will not be recorded.

t_ch: 我绝对不会！
t_en: Not a chance!

t_ch: 金色的丝线微微地颤动。
t_en: The golden thread trembles slightly.

t_ch: 你想送出一个正面的承诺，却无法呈上与之匹配的决心…记作一步。
t_en: Although you attempted to make a promise, your resolve didn't match your response... A step will be recorded.

t_ch: 我用球棒，不用刀。
t_en: I use a baseball bat, not a blade.

t_ch: 金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
t_en: The golden thread trembles violently.

t_ch: 想凭油嘴滑舌将自己送上末路？我可以满足，记作一步。
t_en: Trying to hasten your demise by being glib with your response? I can certainly satisfy your desire. A step will be recorded.

t_ch: 最后一问。
t_en: Final Question.

t_ch: 异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>你体内有一股汹涌澎湃的未知力量…你是否愿意用它来协助黄金裔弑神？</color>
t_en: Outlander, <color=#dbc291ff>an unknown but surging power exists within your body... Are you willing to use it to aid the Chrysos Heirs in slaying the gods?</color>

t_ch: 这你都能觉察到？
t_en: Wait, you can even detect that?

t_ch: 金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
t_en: The golden thread trembles violently.

t_ch: 用问题回答问题，强烈的怀疑、抗拒…记作一步。
t_en: Response to a question with another question indicates intense suspicion and resistance... A step will be recorded.

t_ch: 我不愿意，也不能答应。
t_en: I am not willing, and I cannot agree to your request.

t_ch: 金色的丝线平静如初。
t_en: The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.

t_ch: 如此坚定…更令我好奇，你身体里究竟藏着什么秘密？此步不记。
t_en: Such determination... It makes me wonder what secrets are hidden within you. A step will not be recorded.

t_ch: 那可是毁灭的祸种，小心反噬。
t_en: It's one of the Destruction's seeds of disaster. Be careful, it might backfire.

t_ch: 金色的丝线微微地颤动。
t_en: The golden thread trembles slightly.

t_ch: 愤怒，威胁…但又带着一丝不确定。你也不了解自己的身体。此步暂且不记。
t_en: An angry threat... but one laced with uncertainty. You don't understand the power within your body either. A step will not be recorded this time.

t_ch: 四问已经完成。
t_en: All four questions have been asked and answered.

t_ch: 你们凭借真诚赢得了第二次机会。
t_en: You have earned a second chance with your honesty.

t_ch: 两位可以继续留在奥赫玛，公民仍会视你们为贵宾。但你们必须保证，今日的荒谬一幕不会再次上演。
t_en: Both of you may continue to stay in Okhema, and its citizens will continue to view you as distinguished guests. However, you must promise that today's farce will not occur again.

t_ch: 这话由遭受审讯的人来说更合适吧。
t_en: I think it's more appropriate for us to say that last part.

t_ch: 经历了这一遭，你凭什么觉得我们还会帮助你们？
t_en: You seriously still expect us to help you after what we just went through?

t_ch: 无论你们作何选择，黄金裔都会继续奔赴神谕中的宿命。
t_en: Regardless of your choice, the Chrysos Heirs will continue to follow the path in the prophecy.

t_ch: 二位也许是降临在翁法罗斯的一道希望。但在一切得到证明前…你们不能变成翁法罗斯的一道威胁。
t_en: You may be a ray of hope that fell onto Amphoreus. However, until all has been proven, you cannot be allowed to pose a threat to Amphoreus.

t_ch: 留下来，你会继续监视我们？
t_en: If we stay, will you continue to monitor us?

t_ch: 黄金裔都像你这么多疑吗？
t_en: Are all Chrysos Heirs as paranoid as you?

t_ch: 为了圣城，我愿拾起世间所有被人嫌恶的特质，用尽冰冷但有效的手腕。
t_en: For the holy city, I am willing to bear all the traits that others despise and use every heartless yet effective trick in the book.

t_ch: 恕我们无法在如此高压下继续合作。
t_en: Forgive us, but I'm afraid our cooperation cannot continue under these conditions.

t_ch: 如果不能赢得诸位——不，如果无法赢得你的信任，阿格莱雅女士——我们会自觉离开。翁法罗斯并不是无名客唯一的选择。
t_en: If we cannot gain people's — no, if we cannot gain your trust, Lady Aglaea — we'll depart. Amphoreus isn't the only option for the Nameless.

t_ch: 不必让彼此都落得不体面的收场。
t_en: Things don't have to end on a sour note between us.

t_ch: …我尊重二位的决定。
t_en: ...I respect your decision.

t_ch: 各位，请等一下——
t_en: Hold on! Please wait a moment...

t_ch: …白厄？
t_en: ...Phainon?

t_ch: 阿格莱雅，作为第一个遇见他们的人——有关两位的去留，我也想提供一些看法。
t_en: Aglaea, as the first person to encounter them... I have some thoughts I would like to share regarding whether they can stay.

t_ch: 尽说无妨。
t_en: Do speak your mind.

t_ch: 在重渊与他们初遇时，我同样怀有戒心，回圣城的路上始终没有放下防备。
t_en: When I first met them in the Abyss, I was wary of them as well and never let my guard down throughout our journey back to the holy city.

t_ch: 但保卫奥赫玛一役，我们并肩经历了许多场战斗。决死时刻的眼神不会骗人，我能从他们的眼中找到信念，也愿意将后背交给他们。
t_en: However, during the battle to defend Okhema, we fought side by side numerous times. The look in someone's eyes in moments of life-and-death never lies, and I was able to detect the conviction in their eyes back then. That's why I was willing to put my life in their hands.

t_ch: 请你相信一名战士的直觉。
t_en: Please believe a warrior's intuition.

t_ch: 眼下奥赫玛正需要援手，我不想就这样失去两位盟友。
t_en: At present, Okhema is desperate for aid, and I am loath to lose two allies just like that.

t_ch: 遐蝶小姐也是这么想的，对吧？
t_en: Isn't this what Miss Castorice believes as well?
...Yeah.

t_ch: 我更愿意把「死亡」视作宁静的告别，而非刑罚。
t_en: I'm more willing to view "death" as a peaceful farewell than a punishment.

t_ch: 竟有两位黄金裔愿意为你们作担保，呵…看来是我独断孤行了。
t_en: So, two Chrysos Heirs are willing to vouch for you. Hah... It seems my actions were too high-handed.

t_ch: 白厄，你会尽到东道主的义务，照看好我们的客人吗？
t_en: Phainon, will you fulfill your duty as host and look after our distinguished guests?

t_ch: 我不擅长繁文缛节，但一定尽力而为。
t_en: While I'm not good at formalities, I'll do my best.

t_ch: 蝶…下一次，我希望你能直抒胸襟。
t_en: Cas... Next time, I hope you will express your thoughts openly.

t_ch: 我会的。
t_en: I will.

t_ch: 创世涡心迎来了新的访客。既然你们如此信任这两位异乡人，就好好为他们讲述藏在涡心中的奥秘吧。
t_en: Now, it's time to welcome the newcomers to the Vortex of Genesis. As you both have chosen to trust these outlanders, ensure they are adequately informed about the mysteries concealed within.

t_ch: 四问已经完成。
t_en: All four questions have been asked and answered.

t_ch: 金丝揭露了你们的动摇。很遗憾，两位没能通过考验。
t_en: The golden thread has exposed your hesitations. Regrettably, the both of you have failed the test.

t_ch: 二位可能是降临在翁法罗斯的一道希望，但也可能…是翁法罗斯的一道威胁。我别无选择，只能为你们关上命运的门扉。
t_en: While you may be a ray of hope that fell onto Amphoreus, you may also be... a threat to Amphoreus. You leave me no choice but to shut the doors of your fates.

t_ch: 以一场私刑决定我们的生死，不可理喻……
t_en: Determining our fates with extrajudicial execution... How unreasonable.

t_ch: 过河拆桥？亏我还帮了你们。
t_en: Talk about burning bridges! After all we've done to help you.

t_ch: 公平公义公正在哪里？
t_en: Justice, fairness, impartiality, where art thou?

t_ch: 谁来救救——
t_en: Someone, anyone, save us...

t_ch: 这里…大概没人能听到我们的呼救。
t_en: I don't think anybody will be able to hear our cries... given where we are right now.

t_ch: 为了圣城，我愿拾起世间所有被人嫌恶的特质，用尽冰冷但有效的手腕。
t_en: For the holy city, I am willing to bear all the traits that others despise and use every heartless yet effective trick in the book.

t_ch: 遐蝶。为我们的客人呈上仁慈的送别。
t_en: Castorice, please give our guests a merciful farewell.

t_ch: 不必紧张……
t_en: Don't be nervous...

t_ch: 你不要过来啊…
t_en: D—Don't come near me...

t_ch: 等等，再给我个机会…
t_en: Wait! Please, just give me one more chance...

t_ch: 请…放松。
t_en: Please... relax.

t_ch: 遐蝶将她纤白的食指搭在了你的脉搏处。
t_en: Castorice places her slender, pale finger over your pulse.

t_ch: 一丝凉意穿透了你的肌肤，紧接着渗入了你的经脉。
t_en: A chill seeps through your skin, then immediately spreads into your veins.

t_ch: 遐蝶搭上了她的第二根手指…然后是第三根，直到她的半只手掌轻柔地握住了你的左腕。
t_en: Castorice adds a second finger... then a third, until half her palm gently envelops your left wrist.

t_ch: 视线逐渐模糊下去，取代冰冷现实的是一片紫色的海洋…她口中的花乡……
t_en: Your vision blurs, and cold reality fades into a purple ocean — her promised land of flowers.

t_ch: 然后，你终于明白了……
t_en: Then, you finally understand...

t_ch: …你正在迎接属于自己的甜蜜死亡。
t_en: ...you are currently welcoming your own sweet demise.

t_ch: …等一下！故事可不该结束得如此匆忙啊。
t_en: ...Wait! This story can't end just like that.

t_ch: …白厄？
t_en: ...Phainon?

t_ch: 我还活着。
t_en: I'm still alive.

t_ch: 当然了，朋友。
t_en: You bet you are.

t_ch: 重生之我在翁法罗斯？
t_en: I've been reborn on Amphoreus?

t_ch: 当然不是，朋友，你还好好地活着。
t_en: Not quite, Friend. You're still alive and kicking.

t_ch: 你们来到翁法罗斯才多久？无情如{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，也不会这么仓促结束一段旅程吧？
t_en: You've been on Amphoreus for such a short time. Even someone as ruthless as {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} wouldn't end a journey so hurriedly.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅，作为第一个遇见他们的本地人——有关两位的去留，我也想提供一些看法。
t_en: Aglaea, as the first local to encounter them... I have some thoughts I would like to share regarding their fates.

t_ch: 尽说无妨。
t_en: Do speak your mind.

t_ch: 在重渊与他们初遇时，我同样怀有戒心，回圣城的路上始终没有放下防备。
t_en: When I first met them in the Abyss, I was wary of them as well and never let my guard down throughout our journey back to the holy city.

t_ch: 但保卫奥赫玛一役，我们并肩经历了许多场战斗。决死时刻的眼神不会骗人，我能从他们的眼中找到信念，也愿意将后背交给他们。
t_en: However, during the battle to defend Okhema, we fought side by side numerous times. The look in someone's eyes in moments of life-and-death never lies, and I was able to detect the conviction in their eyes back then. That's why I was willing to put my life in their hands.

t_ch: 请你相信一名战士的直觉。
t_en: Please believe a warrior's intuition.

t_ch: 眼下奥赫玛正需要援手，我不想就这样失去两位盟友。
t_en: At present, Okhema is desperate for aid, and I am loath to lose two allies just like that.

t_ch: 遐蝶小姐也是这么想的，对吧？
t_en: Isn't this what Miss Castorice believes as well?
...Yeah.

t_ch: 我更愿意把「死亡」视作宁静的告别，而非刑罚。
t_en: I'm more willing to view "death" as a peaceful farewell than a punishment.

t_ch: …这样啊。
t_en: ...I see.

t_ch: 竟有两位黄金裔愿意为你们作担保，呵…看来是我独断孤行了。
t_en: So, two Chrysos Heirs are willing to vouch for you. Hah... It seems my actions were too high-handed.

t_ch: 白厄，你会尽到东道主的义务，照看好我们的客人吗？
t_en: Phainon, will you fulfill your duty as host and look after our distinguished guests?

t_ch: 我不擅长繁文缛节，但一定尽力而为。
t_en: While I'm not good at formalities, I'll do my best.

t_ch: 蝶…下一次，我希望你能直抒胸襟。
t_en: Cas... Next time, I hope you will express your thoughts openly.

t_ch: 我会的。
t_en: I will.

t_ch: 创世涡心迎来了新的访客。既然你们如此信任这两位异乡人，就好好为他们讲述藏在涡心中的奥秘吧。
t_en: Now, it's time to welcome the newcomers to the Vortex of Genesis. As you both have chosen to trust these outlanders, ensure they are adequately informed about the mysteries concealed within.

t_ch: 不——经历了这一遭，你凭什么觉得我们还会帮助这里？
t_en: Hold on, you seriously still expect us to help you after what we just went through?

t_ch: 恕我们无法在如此高压下继续合作。如果不能赢得诸位——不，如果无法赢得你的信任，阿格莱雅女士——我们会自觉离开。翁法罗斯并不是无名客唯一的选择。
t_en: Forgive us, but I'm afraid our cooperation cannot continue under these conditions. If we cannot gain people's — no, if we cannot gain your trust, Lady Aglaea — we'll depart. Amphoreus isn't the only option for the Nameless.

t_ch: 不必让彼此都落得不体面的收场。
t_en: Things don't have to end on a sour note between us.

t_ch: 无论你们作何选择，黄金裔都会继续奔赴神谕中的宿命。
t_en: Regardless of your choice, the Chrysos Heirs will continue to follow the path in the prophecy.

t_ch: 白厄说服了我网开一面。至于二位的去留，就由你们自己决定吧。
t_en: Phainon's words have convinced me to make an exception for you. Whether you stay or go after this is for you to decide.

t_ch: 一阵无名之花的暗香涌入了你的鼻腔…余韵如此甜美，令你逐渐忘却了呼吸的意义。
t_en: A subtle fragrance of an unnamed flower fills your senses, its sweetness making you forget the need to breathe.

t_ch: …站在这里，我以黄金裔的尊严起誓，你们的生命并未受到威胁。在审讯开始前，遐蝶小姐就把消息传达给了我，希望我能阻止阿格莱雅。
t_en: ...I swear by the honor of the Chrysos Heirs here that your lives were never in danger. Before the interrogation started, Miss Castorice already sent a message to me, hoping that I would stop Aglaea.

t_ch: 能令阿格莱雅大人动摇的人很少，白厄阁下是之一。
t_en: Only a select few can sway Lady Aglaea, and Lord Phainon is one of them.

t_ch: 可她连句道歉都没说…
t_en: But she didn't even apologize...

t_ch: 白厄的面子这么大？
t_en: Phainon's a big deal, huh?

t_ch: 就别拿我打趣了。
t_en: Oh, please stop.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅她…为了奥赫玛，她的心早就结成了冰。
t_en: Aglaea... She has long sealed her heart in ice, for Okhema's sake.

t_ch: 也许这就是「半神」？立于凡人中间，却又离人们很远。
t_en: Maybe this is the price of being a demigod? Standing among mortals, yet still so far from them.

t_ch: 「半神」？
t_en: Demigod?

t_ch: 啊…又多了一件需要解释的事。别担心，翁法罗斯最深的秘密都藏在这儿了。
t_en: Ah... one more thing to explain. Let's not worry about that for now. You'll soon find out that Amphoreus' deepest secrets are all hidden here.

t_ch: 总之，先抬头看吧：那是创世涡心的<color=#dbc291ff>星宫十二相</color>，它记录着黄金裔的逐火之旅。
t_en: Well, first, kindly look upward. What you see right now is the <color=#dbc291ff>Astral Zodiac</color> of the Vortex of Genesis, divided into twelve parts that record the Flame-Chase Journey of the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 十二张虚位的图腾，对应翁法罗斯的十二尊泰坦。而每一座被点亮的星宿，都代表一颗被人类归于原位的火种。
t_en: The twelve vacant signs symbolize the twelve Titans of Amphoreus, while each illuminated constellation represents one Coreflame that mankind has restored to its rightful place.

t_ch: 归位的火种…有六颗，你们的征途已经走过了半程？
t_en: There are... six restored Coreflames. You're already halfway through your journey?

t_ch: 这是前人用巨大的牺牲换来的。黄金裔的脚步一度遭遇巨大的阻碍，在很长一段时间里毫无进展……
t_en: The generations before us paid a heavy price for that. The journey of the Chrysos Heirs once faced immense hurdles and made no progress for a very long time...

t_ch: 是阿格莱雅和缇宝老师再度召集起世界上的黄金裔，重启了神谕中的征程。
t_en: It was Aglaea and Tribbie who rallied the Chrysos Heirs from all over the world once again, leading us to re-embark on this prophesized journey.

t_ch: 她们两位，也是如今圣城中唯二的「半神」。
t_en: And they are the only two demigods in the holy city.

t_ch: 不应该是唯四吗？
t_en: Shouldn't it be the only four?

t_ch: 虽然缇宝、缇安、缇宁老师是三个人，但以神格来算——还是一位吧！
t_en: While Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon are three individuals, I suppose they are considered one single divine essence.

t_ch: 所以「半神」是什么？
t_en: So, what exactly is a demigod?

t_ch: 当然，我还没忘记这个话题。
t_en: Worry not, I haven't forgotten about that.

t_ch: 过去，泰坦是世界的支柱。而黄金裔从神谕中得到的启示，是要击碎这十二根基柱，重构世界的秩序。
t_en: In the past, the Titans were the pillars of the world. Yet, the prophecy's revelation is that these twelve pillars must be shattered and the world's order reconstructed.

t_ch: 难题就在这里。<color=#dbc291ff>当旧日的神明倒下后，需要有人来暂时扛起断裂的支柱，填补神职空缺，直到创世奇迹降临。</color>
t_en: But here's the problem: <color=#dbc291ff>After the fall of the old gods, someone must hold up the broken pillars and fill the vacant seats until the coming of the Miracle of Genesis.</color>

t_ch: 否则，世界在神谕应验前就会彻底坍塌，变成一片废墟。
t_en: Otherwise, the entire world will collapse before the prophecy comes true.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅和缇宝老师已经埋葬了自己的神明。<color=#dbc291ff>现在的她们，是人也是神，更是翁法罗斯命运的背负者。</color>
t_en: Aglaea and Tribbie have already laid their own gods to rest, <color=#dbc291ff>making them now both human and divine, as well as the bearers of Amphoreus' fate.</color>

t_ch: 好沉重的职责。
t_en: Sounds like quite a responsibility.

t_ch: 你也会成为「半神」吗？
t_en: Will you also become a demigod?

t_ch: 记得你在追逐「纷争」泰坦…
t_en: You mentioned pursuing the Strife Titan...

t_ch: 原来「属于你的火种」是这个意思。
t_en: So, that's what you meant by "your Coreflame."

t_ch: 击落泰坦、回收火种、填补神职——这就是我等黄金裔的使命。我正行在她们二位走过的路上。
t_en: Bringing down the Titans, retrieving the Coreflames, and filling the vacant seats... This is the mission of the Chrysos Heirs, and I'm following in the footsteps of those two.

t_ch: 使命…吗？
t_en: Mission, huh...

t_ch: 对于这十二位泰坦…无论怎么描述，都不如亲耳聆听星宿中的私语更直观。
t_en: When it comes to the twelve Titans... no words can describe them more vividly than the whispers within the constellations.

t_ch: 二位，不妨上前几步，亲自试试？
t_en: Why not step forward and listen to them for yourselves?

t_ch: ……白昼寂静无声，黑暗已经登场……
t_en: ...The day is silent, and darkness has taken the stage...

t_ch: ……火焰节节攀升，鼓点如雨骤降……
t_en: ...Flames rise higher, and drums fall like rain...

t_ch: ……战士浸染金血，战袍织作残章……
t_en: ...Warriors soaked in golden blood, their cloaks tattered...

t_ch: ……青铜为尔华盖，黄铜为余悲响……
t_en: ...Bronze shields you, and brass echoes my sorrow...

t_ch: 只要凑近一些，侧耳倾听，就能捕获虚空中响起的只言片语。
t_en: Move closer, listen carefully, and you may just catch the whispers echoing in the void.

t_ch: 不妨先从天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的声音开始吧？
t_en: How about you start with the Lance of Fury, the voice of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 黄金裔、半神…神谕中书写的，真的是翁法罗斯唯一的命运吗？
t_en: Chrysos Heirs, demigods... Is what's written in the prophecy truly Amphoreus' only possible fate?

t_ch: 抱歉，我只是在自言自语…两位英雄，请上前聆听泰坦之声吧。
t_en: Sorry, I was just thinking out loud... Please, step closer and listen to the voices of the Titans.

t_ch: 如何，你听见了吗？
t_en: So, did you hear it?

t_ch: 听见了…
t_en: I did...

t_ch: 听不懂…
t_en: I couldn't understand it...

t_ch: 第一次听见泰坦之声时，我还是个只知挥剑的孩子，全然不知生命的意义为何物。
t_en: The first time I heard the voices of the Titans, I was just a boy playing with swords, oblivious to the meaning of life.

t_ch: 同样地，我至今不知道神谕为何会选中自己，但我得感谢它…若非踏上这段旅程，我大概已经变成战场上的孤魂野鬼了吧？
t_en: To this day, I still don't know why the prophecy chose me, but I'm grateful for it... Without this journey, I might've already become a wandering soul on the battlefield.

t_ch: 说回你们，我想郑重地发出邀请，希望两位能加入黄金裔的阵营，助我们一同讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，从「纷争」的泰坦手中夺得火种。
t_en: Alright, that's enough of my story. I want to extend a heartfelt invitation to you: Join the Chrysos Heirs, and aid us in hunting down {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and retrieving the Coreflame from the Titan of Strife.

t_ch: 如果二位心中还有疑问，我会尽全力解答。
t_en: If you still harbor doubts, I'll do my best to provide you with answers.

t_ch: 黄金裔是怎么被选中的？
t_en: How are the Chrysos Heirs chosen?

t_ch: …很遗憾，人们至今没能弄清神谕的规则。
t_en: ...Unfortunately, the workings of the prophecy still remain a mystery to us all.

t_ch: 唯一可信的推测是…<color=#dbc291ff>它更青睐那些身陷极端境遇的人，会在他们眼前降下奇迹。</color>
t_en: The only reliable speculation is that... <color=#dbc291ff>it favors those caught in dire circumstances and bestows miracles upon them.</color>

t_ch: 世界上的其他黄金裔呢？
t_en: Where are the other Chrysos Heirs in the world?

t_ch: 相传，第一位黄金裔诞生在千年以前。自那之后，神选者就开始在世间行走。
t_en: Legend has it that the first Chrysos Heir was born millennia ago. Since then, the chosen ones began to walk this earth.

t_ch: 然后便是「黄金战争」…那场战役背靠神明，却让凡人流尽了鲜血，众多英雄在此期间陨落。
t_en: Then came the Chrysos War... A conflict backed by the gods, yet one that brought much bloodshed and claimed many heroes.

t_ch: 到了我出生的年代，相较一段历史，黄金裔的故事已经更接近传说。如果世上还有其他受神谕召唤的人…命运会把他领到我们面前的。
t_en: By the time of my birth, the tales of the Chrysos Heirs had become more like legends than historical accounts. If there are others called forth by the prophecy... I trust that fate will guide them to us.

t_ch: 讨伐尼卡多利的计划是？
t_en: How do you plan to fight Nikador?

t_ch: 勇气和决心都已具备，只等缇安老师找到悬锋城的所在，我们就踏上征程。
t_en: Armed with courage and unwavering resolve, our quest will begin as soon as Trianne locates Castrum Kremnos.

t_ch: 当然，此行注定是一场撼天动地的死斗…做好心理准备。
t_en: Without a doubt, it will be a momentous battle to the death... Prepare yourselves.

t_ch: 我全都了解了。
t_en: I've got it all figured out.

t_ch: 前路艰险，我不会强迫你们。但如果二位决定留下，我——哀丽秘榭的白厄，定会努力修补你们和黄金裔之间的嫌隙，不遗余力。
t_en: The path ahead is bound to be perilous, and I won't impose my will upon you. Yet, if you choose to stay, I, Phainon from Aedes Elysiae, will spare no effort to bridge the gap between you and the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅大人心中的坚冰恐怕难以消融……
t_en: Thawing the ice in Lady Aglaea's heart won't be easy...

t_ch: 但我也会尽力而为。
t_en: But I will do my best as well.

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}，这个决定交给你来做吧。
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, I'll leave the final decision to you.

t_ch: 你不发表些意见吗？
t_en: You don't have any comments?

t_ch: 我相信白厄，但更相信你的决断。
t_en: I trust Phainon, but I trust your judgment more.

t_ch: 我做决定？真的假的？
t_en: You're letting me make the decision? Seriously?

t_ch: 在这种事上，我更信任你的判断。
t_en: I trust your judgment more on matters like this.

t_ch: 留在翁法罗斯。
t_en: Stay on Amphoreus.

t_ch: 太好了，你们果真是翁法罗斯的希望。
t_en: That's wonderful to hear. You truly are the hope of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 我一直坚信，黄金裔的旅途绝非寥寥数人的史诗，我们必须团结一切潜在的盟友——尤其是二位这样的英豪。
t_en: I've always believed that the journey of the Chrysos Heirs is not meant to be the saga of a select few, and that we must unite all potential allies, especially heroic figures like you.

t_ch: 讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，只要能获得成功…想必阿格莱雅也不会再质疑什么了。
t_en: Once we triumph in the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... that should dispel Aglaea's doubts.

t_ch: 白厄阁下…我们的客人似乎有些疲惫。让他们先回浴宫休息片刻吧？
t_en: Lord Phainon... Our guests seem quite weary. Should we have them return to the bath chamber for some rest?

t_ch: …啊，是我有些兴奋了，抱歉，你们在翁法罗斯的第一天已经够漫长了。
t_en: Ah, my apologies. I got a bit carried away. It's been a long first day for you here on Amphoreus.

t_ch: 想离开涡心的话，只要再重复一遍灵水盆前的仪式就好。
t_en: To leave the Vortex, simply repeat the same ritual in front of the spirit basin.

t_ch: 请一定要在浴宫中好好休息。等两位蓄满精力，相信缇安老师也带着悬锋城的消息归来了。
t_en: Be sure to rest well in the bath chamber. I trust that Trianne will have returned with news about Castrum Kremnos by the time the two of you are fully recharged.

t_ch: 离开翁法罗斯。
t_en: Leave Amphoreus.

t_ch: 唔…就此为止？确定要这么做吗？
t_en: So... you'll end things here? Are you sure about that?

t_ch: 开玩笑的，开拓之旅得继续下去。
t_en: Just kidding. We have to press on in our trailblazing expedition.

t_ch: 太好了，你们果真是翁法罗斯的希望。
t_en: That's wonderful to hear. You truly are the hope of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 我一直坚信，黄金裔的旅途绝非寥寥数人的史诗，我们必须团结一切潜在的盟友——尤其是二位这样的英豪。
t_en: I've always believed that the journey of the Chrysos Heirs is not meant to be the saga of a select few, and that we must unite all potential allies, especially heroic figures like you.

t_ch: 讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，只要能获得成功…想必阿格莱雅也不会再质疑什么了。
t_en: Once we triumph in the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... that should dispel Aglaea's doubts.

t_ch: 白厄阁下…我们的客人似乎有些疲惫。让他们先回浴宫休息片刻吧？
t_en: Lord Phainon... Our guests seem quite weary. Should we have them return to the bath chamber for some rest?

t_ch: …啊，是我有些兴奋了，抱歉，你们在翁法罗斯的第一天已经够漫长了。
t_en: Ah, my apologies. I got a bit carried away. It's been a long first day for you here on Amphoreus.

t_ch: 想离开涡心的话，只要再重复一遍灵水盆前的仪式就好。
t_en: To leave the Vortex, simply repeat the same ritual in front of the spirit basin.

t_ch: 请一定要在浴宫中好好休息。等两位蓄满精力，相信缇安老师也带着悬锋城的消息归来了。
t_en: Be sure to rest well in the bath chamber. I trust that Trianne will have returned with news about Castrum Kremnos by the time the two of you are fully recharged.

t_ch: 我累了，我要走。
t_en: I'm tired. I just want to go.

t_ch: …我明白了。回头想想，两位一直出于无私和善意帮助奥赫玛，我们却总是以怀疑和胁迫回应，的确不公平。
t_en: ...I understand. Now that I think back on it, you both have selflessly helped Okhema, while we have met your good will with doubt and intimidation. It's indeed not fair.

t_ch: 早些时候，你们对我的苦衷施以理解，现在该我做一样的事了。
t_en: You showed empathy toward my struggle earlier, and now it's my turn to return that kindness.

t_ch: 黄金裔的旅程…果然很孤独啊。
t_en: The journey of the Chrysos Heirs... truly is a lonely one.

t_ch: 走吧，丹恒，{NICKNAME}。我会带人护送两位回到你们坠落的地方。
t_en: Let's go, Dan Heng, {NICKNAME}. I'll escort you back to where you landed.

t_ch: 我知道，重逢是种奢望。至少我们能让告别不那么草率。
t_en: I know that a reunion in the future is wishful thinking, but at the very least, we can bid each other a proper farewell.

t_ch: 在白厄和一众圣城卫士的护送下，你和丹恒回到了重渊的坠毁点，合力打捞起了列车车厢。
t_en: Escorted by Phainon and the holy city guards, you and Dan Heng return to the crash site in the Abyss. Together, you salvage the Express' coach car.

t_ch: 在一名长成智械模样的奥赫玛公民的协助下，你们驶离了翁法罗斯，没有遭受那所谓「天外诅咒」的谴罚。
t_en: With the assistance of an Okhema citizen resembling an Intellitron, you depart Amphoreus without suffering the so-called "curse from beyond the sky."

t_ch: 返回星穹列车后，你们发现黑天鹅已经悄悄离开。三月七的病情加重了，没有人知道她的症状是因何导致的。
t_en: After returning to the Astral Express, you discover Black Swan has already left without telling anyone. March 7th's condition has gotten worse, but no one seems to know what the cause is.

t_ch: 尽管燃料告急，但你们还是完成了最后一次跃迁，寄希望于下一个目的地能解决你们手头的一切烦忧。
t_en: Despite a fuel shortage, you complete a final warp jump, putting your hopes in the next location and how it might resolve all your worries.

t_ch: 至于「永恒之地」翁法罗斯的命运，以及它终将为银河带来的剧变…至少在你的有生之年内，这一切都与你无关了。
t_en: As for the fate of Amphoreus, the Eternal Land, and the dramatic changes it will bring to the Cosmos... It has nothing to do with you, at least in your lifetime.

t_ch: 真没想到，这一天过得这么戏剧性。
t_en: Well, that was a lot of drama for one day.

t_ch: 走吧。有了白厄的担保，至少可以放下心来先休息了。
t_en: Let's go. With Phainon's guarantee, we can at least take a moment to rest without any worries.

t_ch: 总觉得忘了什么…
t_en: I kind of feel like we might've forgotten something...

t_ch: 喔…给三月拍照。差点就忘了，幸好你还记得这事。
t_en: Oh... We need to take a photo for March. Good thing you still remembered that.

t_ch: 该给三月七拍张这儿的照片。
t_en: We've got to take a photo of this place for March 7th.

t_ch: …差点就忘了，幸好你还记得这事。
t_en: ...I almost forgot. Good thing you still remembered that.

t_ch: 把创世涡心的奇景记录下来吧。
t_en: Let's capture the spectacle of the Vortex of Genesis.

t_ch: 十二尊泰坦的图腾，犹如十二双居高临下的眼目，监视着这个由它们创造、支撑与毁灭的世界。
t_en: The totems of the Twelve Titans stand like twelve pairs of watchful, imperious eyes, overseeing the world they forged, nurtured, and ultimately brought to ruin.

t_ch: 待到十二颗星宿全部被点亮之时，黄金裔们口中的「奇迹」便会被点亮——至少他们的神谕中是如此书写的。
t_en: When the twelve constellations align and shine, the "miracle" that the Chrysos Heirs speak of will illuminate — or so their prophecies claim.

t_ch: 想离开涡心的话，只要再重复一遍灵水盆前的仪式就好。请好好休息。
t_en: To leave the Vortex, simply repeat the same ritual in front of the spirit basin. Rest well, you two.

t_ch: 抱歉，希望你们…能原谅我先前的行为。
t_en: I'm sorry. I hope... you can forgive me for my actions earlier.

t_ch: 我不想让阿格莱雅女士察觉到异样，只能配合她的行动。
t_en: I had to follow Lady Aglaea's instructions to avoid arousing her suspicion.

t_ch: 为什么她让你来处刑？
t_en: Why did she choose you to be the executioner?

t_ch: 我没有责怪你。
t_en: I don't blame you.

t_ch: …可我不应靠近你。
t_en: ...But I should not come near you.

t_ch: 因为我…是「死亡」的影子。
t_en: Because I... am the shadow of "death."

t_ch: 对不起，这个话题有些沉重，我不想展开。请两位听从白厄阁下的建议，尽早回浴宫休息吧。
t_en: I'm sorry, but I prefer not to delve into such a heavy topic at the moment. Please follow Lord Phainon's suggestion and return to the bath chamber for some rest.

t_ch: 如果你们还想聆听世界的声音，也可以在涡心多停留片刻。
t_en: If you're interested in hearing more of the world's voices, feel free to prolong your stay in the Vortex.

t_ch: 发生了好多事啊。
t_en: So much has happened today.

t_ch: 怎么了，我脸上有什么东西吗？
t_en: What? Do I have something on my face?

t_ch: 你今天说的话…
t_en: Today, you talked...

t_ch: …比前三个世界加起来还多。
t_en: ...more than you did in the entire three worlds before this.

t_ch: 没办法，爱说话的人不在，总得有人负责开口。
t_en: Well, since the talkative one isn't around, someone has to take her place.

t_ch: 但我也累了。所以，复盘的环节尽量简短点吧。
t_en: But it's been a long day for me too, so let's get through the review quickly.

t_ch: 同意！
t_en: Agreed!

t_ch: 体感上，我们用大约二十个系统时就摸清了翁法罗斯的现状，还和本地人建立了联系，这是个不错的开始。
t_en: By estimation, it took us about twenty system hours to figure out the current conditions on Amphoreus and build connections with the locals. A pretty good start.

t_ch: 不过，我总觉得水面下还隐藏了什么…就连黄金裔内部，也不是我们想象的那么团结。
t_en: But I feel that there's more to everything than meets the eye... Even the Chrysos Heirs themselves aren't as unified as we imagined.

t_ch: 还来得及反悔吗？
t_en: Is it too late to bail out now?

t_ch: 阿格莱雅说的话，你先别放在心上。她这一通发难有些突然，背后可能另有原因。
t_en: Don't take Aglaea's words to heart right now. Her verbal attack on us was quite sudden. There might be a reason behind it.

t_ch: 局势并不明朗啊。
t_en: We're still looking at things through a clouded lens.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅这一通发难也有些突然，背后可能另有原因。
t_en: Aglaea's verbal attack on us was also quite sudden. There might be a reason behind it.

t_ch: 没想到阿格莱雅那么无情…
t_en: Wasn't expecting Aglaea to be that ruthless...

t_ch: 但我感觉她这一通发难有些突然，背后可能另有原因。
t_en: Her verbal attack on us seemed quite sudden. There might be a reason behind it.

t_ch: 疑团重重，只能全力应对了。
t_en: With all these doubts in our minds, we can only just do our best.

t_ch: 毕竟「开拓」没有标准答案，除了全身心投入到这个世界的循环当中，一步一步脚踏实地，似乎也没有别的办法。
t_en: There's no "right" answer to the Trailblaze, after all. All we can do is dive into this world and take things one step at a time.

t_ch: 虽然还有不少疑问，但大脑已经困乏到难以思考了…白厄说得没错，先休息吧，把问题留给明天。
t_en: Plenty of questions are still up in the air, but my brain is too tired to handle them... Phainon's right. Let's call it a day and save them for tomorrow.

t_ch: 与此同时……
t_en: In the meantime...

t_ch: …阿雅，这次出征会顺利的吧？
t_en: ...Agy, this campaign is going to turn out fine, right?

t_ch: 勿要犹疑，吾师。你是为黄金裔解读神谕之人，你言行中的踟蹰会令众人动摇。
t_en: Do not harbor doubt, teacher. As the interpreter of the prophecy for the Chrysos Heirs, any uncertainty in your words may undermine people's resolve.

t_ch: 知道啦知道啦，但眼下不是只有你和*我们*嘛……
t_en: Alright, alright, but it's just you and us here...

t_ch: 还有…阿雅，其实我想问的是，刚才在涡心，你不会真想把丹恒和{NICKNAME}给……
t_en: By the way... Agy, I was actually wondering, when you were in the Vortex earlier with Dan Heng and {NICKNAME}, were you actually going to...

t_ch: 当然不会。
t_en: Certainly not.

t_ch: 哎…那就好。
t_en: Phew... That's good to know.

t_ch: 为什么明知故问？如果你断定我有杀意，一定会出手阻止的。
t_en: Why even bother to ask? If you were truly convinced of my intent to harm them, you would have intervened.

t_ch: 被你看穿啦。*我们*只是想知道…阿雅，你心里到底是怎么想的？
t_en: You sure don't miss a thing. We are just curious... What is really going through your head, Agy?

t_ch: …我原本的计划是以「流放」作为威胁，考验那二人的意志和决心。
t_en: ...Initially, my plan was to use the threat of "banishment" to test their resolve and perseverance.

t_ch: 但我察觉到了遐蝶的不安。她信任他们，还私下联络了白厄，以为我不知情……
t_en: But I noticed a sense of unease in Castorice. She trusted in them and even reached out to Phainon in secret, believing I was unaware...

t_ch: 所以将计就计，我索性将「流放」改成了「处刑」，用最极端的情境测量那两人的意志。
t_en: Therefore, I took advantage of the situation and changed the threat from "banishment" to "execution," to see if the two could remain firm under the most extreme pressure.

t_ch: 同时，也能促成他们与白厄、遐蝶间更为笃深的关系。
t_en: Simultaneously, it might also strengthen their bonds with Phainon and Castorice.

t_ch: …为了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，必须做到这种程度吗？
t_en: ...Do you have to go to such lengths for the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 可这么一来，想让他们再信任你就难上加难了……
t_en: That's going to make it a lot tougher for you to gain their trust...

t_ch: 这不重要。
t_en: That's not important.

t_ch: 你我终有一日要退出这舞台，翁法罗斯的命运将被移交至他人之手…<color=#dbc291ff>那是你看到的未来，不是吗？</color>
t_en: You and I will eventually step off the stage and leave Amphoreus' fate in the hands of others... <color=#dbc291ff>That's the future you foresee, isn't it?</color>
...Yeah.

t_ch: 那救世的神谕浑浊不清。它撺掇我们挑战众神，却从未告知预言中的「明天」是何模样。
t_en: The prophecy of deliverance is nothing if not ambiguous. It urges us to defy the gods yet refrains from providing a clear glimpse of what lies ahead.

t_ch: 当下，人们愿意相信神谕，才团结在黄金裔周围。但有朝一日，倘若世人的信念发生动摇…一切都会崩塌。
t_en: Right now, it is people's faith in the prophecy that unites them around the Chrysos Heirs. Should a time come when their faith is shaken... all will crumble.

t_ch: 所以，我们必须做好准备。你我身着褴褛又何妨？专心为「救世主」编织战衣便好。
t_en: Hence, we must be prepared. When our task is to craft the armor for the Deliverer, what harm is there if you and I don humble attire?

t_ch: 阿雅啊…你有没有发现……
t_en: Agy... Have you noticed...

t_ch: 你一直说不相信人类的无私，可你自己快要变成活生生的反例了。
t_en: You keep saying that you don't believe in humanity's altruism, but your actions are a counterexample.

t_ch: 也许，是因为「人」的部分正在离我而去。
t_en: Perhaps it's because my "humanity" is distancing itself from me.

t_ch: 又一个没有尽头的黎明，白昼何光，永夜何长。
t_en: Another never-ending dawn. How bright is the day, and how long is the night.

t_ch: 金线今天格外平静，天、地与海洋都屏住了呼吸，是在为一位泰坦注定的亡逝哀悼吗……
t_en: The golden thread hangs unusually silent today, as if the heavens, earth, and ocean are all holding their breath. Could they be mourning the impending downfall of a Titan...

t_ch: 真想沐浴一刻啊…你会陪我同去吗？
t_en: Unwinding in a bath sounds appealing now... Would you care to join me?

t_ch: 走吧，阿雅。都几百年啦，*我们*什么时候拒绝过你的邀请？
t_en: Let's go, Agy. When have we ever been able to say no in all these hundreds of years?

t_ch: 嗯…什么声音？
t_en: Mmm... What's that sound?

t_ch: …声音？谁？那个？哪个？
t_en: ...Sound? Who? That? Which?

t_ch: 谁在说话……
t_en: Who's talking...

t_ch: …冷静。冷静。这次。下次？
t_en: ...Calm down. Calm down. This time. Next time?

t_ch: 告诉我你是谁。
t_en: Tell me who you are.

t_ch: …谁？是谁？你…我…我是谁？
t_en: ...Who? Who is? You... I... Who am I?

t_ch: 是你吗，星核？
t_en: Is that you, Stellaron?

t_ch: …核？星？谁？你…我…我是谁？
t_en: ...Ron? Stella? Who? You... I... Who am I?

t_ch: 别吵吵，让我好好睡觉！
t_en: Oh, shut it! Someone's trying to sleep here!

t_ch: …睡觉？好？不好？你…我…我是谁？
t_en: ...Sleep? Here? There? You... I... Who am I?

t_ch: …碎了。迷失。想要…完整。
t_en: ...Broken. Lost. Want... complete.

t_ch: …睡吧。睡去。打扰…不该。
t_en: ...Sleep. Go sleep. Disturb... should not.

t_ch: （我这是…在做梦吗？）
t_en: (Am I... dreaming?)

t_ch: （脑海中有个声音，感觉持续了一晚上……）
t_en: (Feels like there's been a voice talking in my head all night...)

t_ch: （把这件事也告诉丹恒吧。）
t_en: (I should probably mention this to Dan Heng.)

t_ch: 你醒了，睡得还真久。
t_en: You're finally awake. About time.

t_ch: 是够久的，天好亮啊！
t_en: I slept in pretty late. It's so bright outside!

t_ch: 你忘了么？从抵达圣城开始，天空就一直这么明亮。
t_en: Did you already forget? The sky has been this bright since we arrived at the holy city.

t_ch: 你起床很久了？
t_en: Have you been up for a while?

t_ch: 有一阵了。外面太亮，我睡不沉…从抵达圣城开始，天空就一直这么明亮。
t_en: Yes, I wake up easily when it's too bright outside... The sky has been like this since we arrived at the holy city.

t_ch: 你休息得如何？
t_en: Did you sleep well?

t_ch: 梦里一直有个声音。
t_en: There was this voice in my dream...

t_ch: 声音？又是星核之声吗，还是……
t_en: A voice? The Voice of the Stellaron again or...

t_ch: 像是动物的叫声，但能听懂。
t_en: It sounded like an animal, but somehow, I could understand it.

t_ch: 这句话听着有些矛盾。
t_en: That sounds a bit contradictory.

t_ch: 听不清，它说的话像是谜语。
t_en: I couldn't really make it out. It was like it was speaking in riddles.

t_ch: 从某种意义上说，混乱才是梦的本质。
t_en: In a way, chaos is the nature of dreams.

t_ch: 它…挺可爱的，不像星核。
t_en: It was... pretty cute, unlike the Stellaron.

t_ch: 看来不是噩梦。但小心了，那也可能是蛊惑你的手段。
t_en: So, it wasn't a nightmare. But be careful, that might be its means of luring you in.

t_ch: 还是尽量记下能回想起的内容吧。说不定这场怪梦也和这个世界的规则有关。
t_en: Keep a note of whatever you can remember. This strange dream might be connected to the rules of this world.

t_ch: 你睡着的时候，我思考了一些问题，眼下最麻烦的，果然还是翁法罗斯人对天外世界的态度。短期内，我们恐怕没办法联络上列车了。
t_en: While you were asleep, I did some thinking. I believe the most pressing concern is still how the people of Amphoreus view what's beyond the sky. Unfortunately, contacting the Express might not be feasible for a while.

t_ch: 如果我们尝试飞出翁法罗斯…
t_en: If we try to fly out of Amphoreus...

t_ch: …不会也招致天谴吧？
t_en: ...Will we also incur the wrath of the gods?

t_ch: 是的。最坏情况下，翁法罗斯的入口是道单向门，只能进不能出。
t_en: Yes. In the worst case, the entrance to Amphoreus is a one-way door, letting people in but not out.

t_ch: 嗯？有新消息。
t_en: Hm? There's a new message.

t_ch: 与此同时，{NICKNAME}睡得正酣……
t_en: Meanwhile, {NICKNAME} is in deep sleep...

t_ch: 你们果然来了。
t_en: Great to see you here!

t_ch: 哼…真打算将命运交给两个陌生人，不知是疯狂还是愚蠢。
t_en: Hmph... Entrusting our fates to two strangers, is this madness or folly?

t_ch: 说不定两者兼有呢。万敌，你也该多交几个朋友了。
t_en: Maybe both. You should really make more friends, Mydei.

t_ch: 英雄们，请安静。
t_en: Heroes, your attention please.

t_ch: 缇安捎回了信息：多年以来，我们首次驱散了包围悬锋城的迷雾，确定了它的位置。
t_en: Trianne has returned with news: For the first time in many years, we have dispersed the fog around Castrum Kremnos and verified its location.

t_ch: 黄金裔等待已久的时刻终于到来。前路已经明朗：战胜狂暴的「天谴之矛」{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，将「纷争」的火种带回奥赫玛，为神谕中的奇迹添薪。
t_en: The awaited moment has finally arrived for the Chrysos Heirs. Our path forward is now clear: Vanquish {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the violent Lance of Fury, and bring the Coreflame of Strife back to Okhema to fuel the prophesized miracle.

t_ch: 使命艰巨，我必须聆听所有人的声音，决定出征的人选。
t_en: This is an arduous mission, and I must heed the voices of all to determine the best candidates for this campaign.

t_ch: 若诸位心中已有提议，现在便是宣明的时刻。
t_en: Should you harbor any thoughts, this is the moment to bring them forth.

t_ch: 我，哀丽秘榭的白厄，愿前往讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: I, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, wish to join the crusade against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 此外，我还想推举两位来自异邦的勇士——他们同我一起面对过{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的半身，我对他们的勇武没有丝毫怀疑。
t_en: Furthermore, I recommend the two warriors from foreign lands. They have fought alongside me against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s double, and I have full faith in their bravery.

t_ch: 听着好危险，能反悔吗？
t_en: That sounds really dangerous. Is it too late to back out?

t_ch: 只在浴宫里躺着可算不上「开拓」。
t_en: Lounging in a bath chamber isn't exactly trailblazing.

t_ch: 被架起来，只能拼命了。
t_en: Guess we have no choice but to give it our all.

t_ch: 还没习惯吗？这是「开拓」的宿命。
t_en: Are you still not used to it? This is the destiny of a Trailblazer.

t_ch: 我，悬锋城的万敌，愿意前往。
t_en: I, Mydei from Castrum Kremnos, volunteer to join.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}已受岁月腐蚀，失去骄傲。但它的力量依旧强大，若想摘得胜利，唯有全军出动。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has become corrupted over the years, their pride waning, but their might endures. Victory only lies in assembling a full-fledged army.

t_ch: …我也愿意陪同前往。引渡将死的灵魂，为各位纾解重压……
t_en: ...I'm willing to join as well, to help guide departing souls and ease everyone's burdens...

t_ch: 我赞同你的观点。纵使神性已经流逝殆尽，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}仍是不可轻视的大敌。
t_en: I concur with your opinion. Though their divinity has faded, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} remains a formidable adversary.

t_ch: 但我不能将诸位的性命尽数押在一场战役上。
t_en: Yet, I cannot jeopardize all of your lives in one single battle.

t_ch: 如今，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}不知去向，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}仍在觊觎大地；而{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，虽然还未流露出对人类的敌意，但同样不容小觑。
t_en: As we speak, the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#} remains missing, the {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#} is still coveting our land, and {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} present significant threats, despite their lack of overt hostility toward humanity.

t_ch: 即便圣城有两位半神驻守，这赌注也太过激进。因此……
t_en: Even with two demigods protecting the holy city, the risk is too great. Hence...

t_ch: 遐蝶，你要留在城中。前线并非你的归宿，战场应当被交还给纯粹的战士。
t_en: Castorice, you must remain here. Your place is not on the front lines, and the battlefield is best left to the warriors.

t_ch: …我明白了。
t_en: ...I understand.

t_ch: 至于这两位异乡的勇士…挑选一位与你同行吧，白厄。将两位贵客一并推上前线，不是主人应有的作为。
t_en: As for the two foreign warriors... Select one to accompany you, Phainon. Placing both esteemed guests on the front line would not be proper.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}擅长使用多种武器，那把炎枪不止一次化解了敌人的攻势。而我和万敌都更擅长进攻，如果仅从作战角度考虑……
t_en: {NICKNAME} excels in wielding a range of weapons, and {M#his}{F#her} flaming lance has quelled the enemy's advances multiple times. Mydei and I are both better at offense, so from a tactical standpoint...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，不知道你意下如何？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, would you be willing to fight alongside us?

t_ch: 来吧，搞起！
t_en: Sure, let's do this!

t_ch: 我坦度不一定够。
t_en: I might not be tanky enough, though.

t_ch: 有他们两人在，应该能速战速决。
t_en: With those two, the battle should end quickly.

t_ch: 可以试试让丹恒出肉装…
t_en: We could try letting Dan Heng tank...

t_ch: 你在说什么…不是开玩笑的时候。
t_en: What are you talking about? Now's not the time for jokes.

t_ch: 只要{NICKNAME}没有异议…阿格莱雅，就把狩猎泰坦的使命交给我们三人吧。
t_en: If {NICKNAME} has no objections... Aglaea, the three of us will take on the mission to hunt down the Titan.

t_ch: …悬锋城是你的故乡，迈德漠斯，你的族人曾是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的子民——但你选择了依归奥赫玛，为神谕奉献己身。
t_en: Mydeimos, Castrum Kremnos was your home. Your people were once {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} followers, yet you've chosen to turn to Okhema and dedicate yourself to the prophecy.

t_ch: 你会否向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神躯发誓，将黄金裔的使命视作至高的职责？
t_en: Do you swear upon {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s body to make this mission of the Chrysos Heirs your foremost duty?

t_ch: 自{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}屈服于疯狂，它便不再是我族的神祇。
t_en: When {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} succumbed to madness, they stopped being a god to my people.

t_ch: 我会以人之怒火，剥夺神的权柄。至于火种，还有那即将空缺的神位……
t_en: I will use my wrath as a human to strip that god of their authority. As for the Coreflame and that soon-to-be-vacant divine throne...

t_ch: 那若是你渴求之物，就拿去吧。我对取代神明毫无兴趣。
t_en: If that is the object you desire, you can have it. I have no interest in becoming a replacement god.

t_ch: 哈…真是大方，但我不喜欢接受施舍。向{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的心脏刺出最后一剑的，一定是我。
t_en: Hah! How generous, but I'm not the type to accept charity, so I'll definitely be the one who deals the final blow through {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s heart.

t_ch: 如此一来，远征悬锋城的队伍已经成型。哀丽秘榭的白厄，悬锋城的万敌，还有…来自异乡的{NICKNAME}。
t_en: The party that will embark on the expedition to Castrum Kremnos is decided: Phainon from Aedes Elysiae, Mydei from Castrum Kremnos, and... {NICKNAME} from the outlands.

t_ch: 我——奥赫玛的阿格莱雅，黄金裔，承载{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}神权的半神——对你们即将践行的道路施以祝福。
t_en: I — Aglaea from Okhema, Chrysos Heir and the demigod who bears {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s divine authority — hereby bless your journey ahead.

t_ch: 缇安会为你们打开通往悬锋城的大门。愿金色的丝线指引你们的征途，亦愿它能带你们找到归家的路。
t_en: Trianne will open the gate that will lead you to Castrum Kremnos. May the golden thread guide you on your journey and bring you safely home.

t_ch: 走哇，走哇~风风…旋风…悬锋城！
t_en: Blow, wind, blow~! All the way to Castrum Kremnos!

t_ch: 呜呼！小白，小敌…来飞呀，我们一起飞过去！
t_en: Woohoo! Snowy, De, let's fly together! All the way across!

t_ch: 我们背后可没长翅膀啊，缇安老师，能麻烦你开一扇门吗？
t_en: We don't have wings on our backs, Trianne. Can you open a gate for us?

t_ch: 噢…门，好无聊噢。那好吧，来开门！「百界门」！呼呜——
t_en: Oh... A gate. How boring. Alright, let's open a gate! Century Gate! Woo!!

t_ch: 她怎么像个小孩子一样？
t_en: Why does she act like a child?

t_ch: 原来是虚空开门？
t_en: Oh, it's not an actual gate?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，你以为是真正的城门吗？
t_en: Hahaha, were you expecting actual city gates?

t_ch: 别看缇安老师贪玩，她可是翁法罗斯技艺最精湛的门匠，创造出的「百界门」万无一失。
t_en: It's true Trianne is very playful, but she's the best gatekeeper in Amphoreus. Her Century Gate never fails.

t_ch: 还有失败的可能性？
t_en: There's a chance of failure?

t_ch: …有别的旅行方式吗？
t_en: ...Is there another way to travel?

t_ch: 与其担心「门」的问题，不如先想想我们三人要如何对抗千军万马。
t_en: Instead of worrying about gates, why don't you take the time to think about how the three of us are supposed to fend off an entire army.

t_ch: 这可不像你啊？万敌的万，难道不是「以一敌万」的万吗？
t_en: That's not like you at all, Mydei. Don't tell me you're scared?

t_ch: 好啦！门…门…很快，马上，「百界门」要打开啦！
t_en: Alright! Century Gate... is opening... soon! Right now!

t_ch: 小白，小敌，还有…新来的小灰，准备好出发了吗？
t_en: Snowy, De, and newbie Little Gray, are you all ready?

t_ch: 出发吧，去弑神！
t_en: Let's go slay a god!

t_ch: 是神，是神！
t_en: Slay, slay!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，带上这个吧。
t_en: Hold on, {NICKNAME}, take this with you.

t_ch: 丹恒将三月七的相机交给了你……
t_en: Dan Heng gives March 7th's camera to you...

t_ch: 这趟冒险的景象，也为三月记录下来吧。
t_en: Record the sights you see on your adventure for March.
